title: uragoga longipedunculata
intro: Uragoga longipedunculata is a plant species, also known as the 'Long-stalked Uragoga', which belongs to the family Annonaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Uragoga longipedunculata include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
